seoTitle: Add a Contact Us Form to Your Canva Website
metaDescription: Learn how to add and customize a Contact Us form on your Canva website so visitors can easily reach out to you.
intro: Adding a Contact Us form to your Canva website makes it easy for potential clients or followers to reach out directly. This guide walks through setting up and customizing the form so it fits your site and workflow.

steps.heading: Set up your Canva website
steps.body: Make sure your Canva website is published and ready for edits before adding new elements like a contact form.

steps.heading: Add the Contact Us form
steps.body: Locate the form element in Canva's website builder and place it on the appropriate page of your site.

steps.heading: Customize your form fields
steps.body: Adjust the fields to collect the information you need, such as name, email, and message.

steps.heading: Integrate with email marketing
steps.body: Connect the form to your email tool or CRM if available, so submissions flow directly into your existing workflow.

faq.question: Where do form submissions go?
faq.answer: Submissions are typically routed to the email address associated with your Canva account or a connected integration, depending on your setup.

faq.question: Can I customize the fields on the form?
faq.answer: Yes, you can adjust which fields appear and whether they're required, depending on what information you want to collect.

faq.question: Is the Contact Us form available on the free plan?
faq.answer: Basic website form functionality is generally available, though some advanced integrations may require a paid Canva plan.

faq.question: Can I automate responses to form submissions?
faq.answer: If connected to an email marketing or CRM tool, you can often set up automated replies to acknowledge form submissions.
